hero.intro: Alex and as a Senior Product Designer

cases.title: Selected cases
cases.description: Three chapters of the same product ecosystem — each with its own audience, mental model and success metric.

items.title: Rizzult — App for Influencers
items.description: Mobile product for creators to manage deals, content and payouts. From discovery to deep dashboards.

items.title: Rizzult Talent Manager
items.description: Web cockpit for talent managers to oversee rosters, negotiate with brands and close contracts.

items.title: Rizzult for Brands
items.description: Self-serve platform for brands to launch campaigns, track performance and pay creators.

about.title: About me
about.body: Product designer with 7+ years shipping B2B and B2C products end-to-end — from problem framing and research to pixel-precise delivery. Happy to own a feature, happier to own an outcome.

process.title: My process
process.description: Five steps from problem to production. Lightweight enough to move fast, structured enough to defend in a product review.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Stakeholder interviews, desk research, competitor teardown.

steps.title: Define
steps.description: Problem statement, user jobs, success metrics agreed in writing.

steps.title: Explore
steps.description: Divergent sketches, low-fi flows, quick usability loops.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: High-fi UI, design-system tokens, interaction specs handed off with zero ambiguity.

steps.title: Ship & learn
steps.description: Paired with engineering during build, post-launch analytics review, next-bet shortlist.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: What I practice daily. Bold if it's on the critical path for most briefs I take.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Where I've shipped, studied and learned the hard lessons.

bullets: Owned end-to-end design of three B2B2C products sharing one design system.
Led weekly research loops with creators, agencies and brand ops.
Shipped the 0 → 1 talent-manager cockpit used by 40+ agencies.
Helped pivot a consumer fintech from card swipe to cashback marketplace.
Built the in-house design-system from zero tokens to 200+ components.
Delivered MVP UI for two SaaS startups (one acquired).
Partnered with founders on positioning, IA and investor decks.
Coached two junior designers through their first shipped features.
Visual-identity work for early-stage DTC brands.
Began transitioning from brand to product systems.
Thesis on accessible wayfinding in public transit.

footerCta.title: Let's connect
footerCta.description: Open to product design roles, collaborations, and meaningful conversations.

rizzult-influencers.title: Rizzult — App for Influencers
rizzult-influencers.subtitle: The creator-side mobile app. From empty-state to payouts dashboard.

rizzult-talent-manager.title: Rizzult Talent Manager
rizzult-talent-manager.subtitle: The agency cockpit. Roster management, deal flow, and payouts in one place.

rizzult-brands.title: Rizzult for Brands
rizzult-brands.subtitle: Self-serve campaign launcher. Discovery, briefing, payments — in one flow.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're after doesn't exist — or the link is dated. Head back to the homepage and try again.
